【OpenClaw Finance Deterministic Report Job】

/opt/homebrew/bin/python3 /Users/leofitz/.openclaw/workspace/finance/scripts/finance_discord_report_job.py --mode marketday-review

Output discipline:
- Return stdout exactly.
- If stdout is NO_REPLY, return only NO_REPLY.
- Do not summarize.
- Do not send messages yourself; OpenClaw delivery handles Discord.
- Review-only; no execution.

【OpenClaw Finance Deterministic Scanner Job】
Run exactly:
/opt/homebrew/bin/python3 /Users/leofitz/.openclaw/workspace/finance/scripts/finance_llm_context_pack.py
/opt/homebrew/bin/python3 /Users/leofitz/.openclaw/workspace/finance/scripts/query_pack_planner.py
/opt/homebrew/bin/python3 /Users/leofitz/.openclaw/workspace/finance/scripts/finance_worker.py
/opt/homebrew/bin/python3 /Users/leofitz/.openclaw/workspace/finance/scripts/finance_parent_market_ingest_cutover.py
/opt/homebrew/bin/python3 /Users/leofitz/.openclaw/workspace/finance/scripts/gate_evaluator.py

Contract markers:
- Read-only scanner context is /Users/leofitz/.openclaw/workspace/finance/state/llm-job-context/scanner.json.
- Context pack is a view cache and must have pack_is_not_authority=true.
- query_pack_planner.py owns QueryPack generation.
- QueryPack is not evidence; object_links and unknown_discovery_exhausted_reason remain required contract fields.
- unknown_discovery cannot be satisfied by held/watchlist tickers.
- unknown_discovery_minimum_attempts remains enforced by scanner.json/query_pack_planner.py.
- 不得把已在 watchlist/held 的标的当作 unknown_discovery。

Output discipline:
- Return only one line: scanner=ok|mode=market-hours-scan
- Do not summarize.
- Do not emit progress text.
- Do not send messages yourself; delivery.mode is none.
- No execution; review-only.
